name: Planner uses pixel-panel styling (no rounded-lg containers)
description: After TASK D pixel-panel conversion, verify the planner page renders academic event chips and deadline banners inside pixel-panel styled containers rather than rounded-lg containers. The visual should be cohesive with the pixel-art design system.

planSteps.description: Log in with test credentials and navigate to /app/planner.
The planner page renders with a weekly calendar grid visible.

Any info banners, deadline warnings, or academic event containers on the page use the pixel-panel style (visible border, no rounded corners). If no academic events exist, assert the calendar grid is cleanly rendered.
The week advances without visual glitches — the grid updates and no containers break or show inconsistent styling.
